trigger_reason: step 13 FIRED for R805; step 13.5 v11 adversarial attack triggered.

step_13_spec_pre_check_input.rationale: Adjoint-representation module uses Lie algebra g action on hidden states; equivariance under inner-automorphism conjugation; introduces new learnable Lie-algebra generators distinct from baseline (similar to R756 SU(2) but uses Adjoint representation on a higher-dimensional Lie group).

attacks.claim: Adjoint action at small generator-magnitude reduces to identity + first-order perturbation; equivalent to standard residual with rotation.
attacks.evidence: For small generator x in Lie algebra, exp(ad_x) approx I + ad_x; the action is a linear map close to identity.
attacks.rebuttal: The Adjoint representation has dimension dim(g) = 8 for SU(3) (vs trivial for U(1)); the equivariance constraint forces the latent dynamics to satisfy bracket-equivariance which is genuinely non-trivial when initialized at non-zero Lie-algebra magnitude. Training penalty maintains non-zero generator-magnitude. The structural distinguishability is at the Lie-bracket commutator level; trivializability requires forcing the generator to zero (which the architecture explicitly avoids).

attacks.claim: 3-seed paired t-test on LRA Pathfinder/WMT16 has ~50% power
attacks.evidence: Standard power calculation; LRA std approx 0.8 percentage points

attacks.claim: SU(2)-equivariant baselines (R756 retrofit) are not adequate; should compare against E(2)-equivariant
attacks.rebuttal: C_baseline is standard transformer; B_control is no-module ablation. Adding E(2)-equivariant would be informative but not load-bearing for the architectural-distinguishability claim against baseline.

rationale: R805 Adjoint-representation equivariant module: post-attack distinguishability TRUE (architectural-distinguishability preserved via the rebuttal arguments).
v14_step_14_input_signal: post_attack=true; step 10 verdict (from 10_decision.json) = FAIL with total_hits=1; step 14 will detect INCOHERENT (step 10 FAIL + step 13.5 TRUE) -> INVESTIGATIVE_CANDIDATE
